chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No. 440/2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No. 6638/2018. 2. Also for orders on CMA No. 16438/2018. 09-04-2019 Mr. Asad Ali, Advocate for the plaintiff. Mr. Ziaul Haq Makhdoom, Advocate for defendant No.4. Mr. Akhtar Hussain, Advocate for BOR. Mr. Long Khan, State Counsel. --------- Through this application, the plaintiff and defendant No.4 seek compromise in the present suit in terms mentioned in the said application. From the record it appears that on 10.07.2018, learned Additional Advocate General Sindh has filed objection to the said compromise application. Today learned State Counsel submits that he extends no objection to the grant of the compromise application. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the B.,O.R. also refers the counter affidavit to the said application available at page 751 whereby the Section Officer of BOR extends his no objection to the grant of the said compromise application. In view of the no objections recorded by the learned State Counsel as well as learned counsel for B.O.R., this application is allowed as prayed. Learned counsel for the defendant No.4 submits that this compromise reached between the parties in May 2018 and they have already paid substantial amount towards the compromise only R.16 Million is remained to be paid which the defendant No.4 is ready to pay the same in shape of pay orders/cheques to the plaintiff and now defendant No.4 is handing over the cheques to the plaintiff bearing No. 00330644, 00330645, 00330646, 00330647,00330648 and pay orders B.C. No. 14704985 and 14704988 both dated 05.04.2019 and 08.04.2019 respectively.

Learned counsel for the defendant No.4 submits that this compromise reached between the parties in May 2018 and they have already paid substantial amount towards the compromise only R.16 Million is remained to be paid which the defendant No.4 is ready to pay the same in shape of pay orders/cheques to the plaintiff and now defendant No.4 is handing over the cheques to the plaintiff bearing No. 00330644, 00330645, 00330646, 00330647,00330648 and pay orders B.C. No. 14704985 and 14704988 both dated 05.04.2019 and 08.04.2019 respectively. The suit is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE M.Tahir/PA.
